headline: Sealed Super Mario Bros. sells for a record $3 million
summary: A sealed copy of Super Mario Bros. sold for $3 million at auction. This sets a new record for video game sales. It surpasses the previous record of $2 million, also for the same game.

headline: Microsoft hasn’t ruled out spinning off Xbox
summary: Microsoft is considering spinning off its Xbox division into a separate company. Significant layoffs are planned within the Xbox division. Plans for the next-gen Project Helix console are being reevaluated.

headline: Bose’s latest QuietComfort Ultra are $70 off, marking a new low price
summary: Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones are currently $70 off. This marks a new record low price for the second-generation model. They offer excellent noise cancellation and a foldable design, ideal for travel.

headline: My first 24 hours with Siri AI on the Mac
summary: The author is testing the new Siri AI coming to macOS 27 Golden Gate. Initial impressions suggest a potential improvement over previous Siri versions. The author, who previously disliked Siri, is cautiously rethinking its utility.

headline: Milly Alcock Says Her Supergirl Cape Was Made With Material from Christopher Reeve's Superman Suit
summary: Milly Alcock's Supergirl cape contains material from Christopher Reeve's Superman suit. She makes her standalone debut as Kara Zor-El later this month. This detail connects her character to the original Superman legacy.

headline: Jesse Eisenberg Turned Down The Social Reckoning Because He 'Has His Problems With' Mark Zuckerberg, Aaron Sorkin Says
summary: Jesse Eisenberg declined to reprise his role as Mark Zuckerberg in 'The Social Reckoning'. Director Aaron Sorkin tried for three days to convince him. Eisenberg reportedly has 'problems with' Mark Zuckerberg.

headline: Xbox Reportedly Speeding Up New Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo Games as Microsoft Leaves Spinning Off the Business on the Table
summary: Xbox CEO Asha Sharma is reportedly accelerating development of new Elder Scrolls, Fallout, and Halo games. This comes as Microsoft considers restructuring or spinning off its gaming division. The future of Xbox's business model is under review.

headline: Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced New Content Detailed in Developer Deep Dive
summary: Ubisoft released a deep dive detailing new content for Assassin's Creed: Black Flag Resynced. The updated version promises loads of new content not in the original. Fans can expect significant additions to the game.

headline: US-Iran deal scheduled to be signed on Sunday, says Trump
summary: Donald Trump announced a US-Iran deal is scheduled for Sunday. Iran had previously expressed caution about the exact timing. Details of the deal remain to be confirmed.

headline: Molly Russell's dad says PM rushing social media restrictions 'deplorable'
summary: Molly Russell's father criticizes the PM for rushing social media restrictions. He believes the plans are being fast-tracked for 'political reasons.' His daughter took her own life after viewing harmful online content.

headline: Royal Family watch Red Arrows flypast on Buckingham Palace balcony
summary: The Royal Family watched the Red Arrows flypast from Buckingham Palace. The event marks the King's official birthday. Over 1,400 armed forces members participated in the annual spectacle.

headline: Thousands gather for anti-racism rally in Belfast after disorder
summary: Thousands attended an anti-racism rally at Belfast City Hall. The demonstration followed a week of violence and disorder in the city. Protesters gathered to advocate against racism.
